Key evidence includes: (1) FCF yield and EV/EBIT vs. sector (TAP: 9.6%, 9.8x; CCEP: 10.8%, 11.3x; SAM: 9.1%, 21.6x; MNST: 3%, 28.9x; CELH: P/E 147x; KDP: P/E 24.5x).
